title: Quality Consolidation + Crawl Demand Reduction — Final Report
key_accomplishment: Found and fixed ~90 broken internal links across 80+ blog posts — the real 404 pollution source

what_was_discovered.root_cause_of_404_pollution: Blog posts' relatedCalculators arrays referenced wrong calculator slugs that 404: 'loan' (64 uses), 'retirement' (6), 'budget' (19), 'inflation' (1)
what_was_discovered.impact: Every blog page was generating links to 404 URLs, wasting crawl budget and sending users to dead pages
what_was_discovered.why_missed_before: Phase 31.1 only checked sitemaps and dashboard/auth/cookie links — didn't audit blog post relatedCalculators slug accuracy

authority_flow_improvement.before: ~90 blog posts linked to 404 pages — wasted authority, confusing Google
authority_flow_improvement.after: All relatedCalculators now point to valid money page and supporting calculators
authority_flow_improvement.effect: Google now sees cleaner internal link graph with authority flowing to real pages, not 404s

compliance.only_targeted_fixes: ~90 broken links in one file (blog posts.ts)

success_condition_met: Phase 31.2 identified and fixed the real internal 404 pollution source (~90 broken blog links). Authority now flows to real money pages. Crawl demand from broken links eliminated.
next_recommended_action: Monitor GSC for: (1) reduced 404 count after Google recrawls blogs, (2) first content click from the 3 breakthrough pages, (3) any indexing movement on money pages
